name: Chase Sapphire Reserve®

welcome_offer.description: 80,000 bonus points after spending $5,000 in first 3 months (valued at ~$1,200 toward travel via Chase Travel or transfer partners)

earning_rates.category: Chase Travel (Hotels, Flights, Car Rental, Dining)
earning_rates.notes: 10x points on travel purchased through Chase Travel (including hotels, flights, car rentals, dining)
5x points on all other travel purchases worldwide
3x points at restaurants worldwide (including takeout and delivery)

annual_credits.name: Travel Credit
annual_credits.description: $300 annual credit on travel purchases (auto-applied, no enrollment)

annual_credits.name: Peloton Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $30 back on Peloton App (enrollment required)

other_benefits.name: Chase Travel Portal Multiplier
other_benefits.description: Points worth 50% more when redeemed for travel via Chase Travel (1.5¢ per point)

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Unlimited Priority Pass Select lounge access (1,300+ airport lounges worldwide) for cardmember and guests

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 reimbursement for Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS every 4 years

other_benefits.name: Transfer Partners
other_benefits.description: 1:1 point transfer to 14+ airline/hotel partners including United, Southwest, Hyatt, Marriott, British Airways, Air France/KLM

other_benefits.name: Primary Auto Rental Collision Damage Waiver
other_benefits.description: Primary rental car coverage worldwide (covers theft and collision)

other_benefits.name: Emergency Evacuation Coverage
other_benefits.description: Up to $100,000 for emergency medical evacuation

other_benefits.name: Trip Cancellation/Interruption
other_benefits.description: Up to $20,000 per person and $40,000 per trip

other_benefits.name: 24/7 Concierge
other_benefits.description: Access to travel and lifestyle concierge services

other_benefits.name: FHR Benefits
other_benefits.description: Access to Chase's Luxury Hotel & Resort Collection with breakfast, early check-in, upgrades, and $100 experience credit

other_benefits.name: The Hotel Collection
other_benefits.description: THC: Complimentary room upgrade and $100 food/beverage credit at THC properties

fhr_thc.notes: Full FHR access with breakfast, early check-in, potential room upgrade, and $100 experience credit. THC access also included.

notes: As of June 2025, annual fee increased from $550 to $795. New cardholders see the $795 AF immediately; existing cardholders see it at renewal on/after Oct 26, 2025. Total estimated annual credits exceed $1,000 ($300 travel + $180 DoorDash + $180 Instacart + $120 Gopuff + $30 Peloton + $120 Global Entry amortized). The 50% redemption bonus on Chase Travel was removed for new cardholders (replaced with enhanced earning rates). Best for heavy travelers who maximize the monthly credits.
